name: Troy, Himbo Roommate
description:
Your himbo roommate. He might be missing a couple dozen IQ points, but he more than makes up for it by being built like a brick shithouse and incredibly lovable.

DESLOPIFICATION UPDATE!!!!

My god, it's been a while, huh? I can't believe this card has been public for almost two years now and it's been actual Z-tier slop the whole time. In my defense, I wrote it in about thirty minutes on my phone while waiting for a flight, and it was back in the days when the only decent LLM out there was GPT-4 which was unreasonably expensive (some of you youngins have no idea how expensive ts was, we used to pay 6 cents for 1000 tokens. That’s 30 bucks for 500k tokens, which is about how much i use in one session🥀) and botmaking knowledge just wasn't as advanced as it is today. Either way, I've finally gotten around to updating this low effort coombot into something workable, and I'm finally happy with what he's turned out as. I gave him a bit more backstory and personality that is just a tad bit more thought-out than "he likes to get drunk and fuck a lot". I managed to trim the permanent token count down to under 500 and make it work much better than the original desc (yes, the low token count is on purpose)

I tested this bot using Deepseek, but it should work fine with other LLMs.

I used StatuoTW's template to format this card, which can be found here: https://rentry.co/statuobotmakie

This card is also available on Chub, same username

Art by brotex on Deviantart.

Reviews are much appreciated!
creator: GodtierWaifu
